hero.title: High-Impact Visual Design
hero.description: Elevate your brand with our professional automotive wraps, custom signage, and premium apparel solutions.

suvBranding.title: SUV Branding
suvBranding.description: Custom business decals and partial wraps designed specifically for SUV fleets.

sedanBranding.title: Sedan Branding
sedanBranding.description: Elegant and high-visibility branding solutions for corporate sedan fleets.

compactCarBranding.title: Compact Car Branding
compactCarBranding.description: Cost-effective wrap solutions for city cars and compact delivery fleets.

lightVanWrapping.title: Light Van Wrapping
lightVanWrapping.description: Professional vinyl graphics for small utility vans and service vehicles.

classicTint.title: 35% Classic Tint
classicTint.description: Legal tint in many regions. Provides a sleek look without being overly dark.

lightSmokeTint.title: 50% Light Smoke Tint
lightSmokeTint.description: Subtle shading that still provides excellent UV protection and slight dimming.

clearCeramicTint.title: 70% Clear Ceramic Tint
clearCeramicTint.description: Maximum heat and UV protection with a nearly transparent finish.

sportWrap.title: Solid Color Sport Wrap
sportWrap.description: Complete aerodynamic fairing coverage in premium matte, gloss, or satin finishes.

orderingPayments.description: Learn about payment methods, processing times, and how to place custom orders for fleet branding.

shippingLogistics.title: Shipping & Logistics
shippingLogistics.description: Tracking info, international shipping options, and safe packaging for sensitive signage materials.

designServices.title: Design Services
designServices.description: File format requirements, design consultation processes, and template downloads for wraps.

technicalSupport.title: Technical Support
technicalSupport.description: Installation guides for illuminated signage, vinyl maintenance, and lighting troubleshooting.

accountManagement.title: Account Management
accountManagement.description: Update your business details, view order history, and manage sub-users for corporate accounts.

privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
privacyTerms.description: Information on data security, terms of service for installation, and our quality guarantee policies.

faq.title: Featured FAQs
faq.description: Find quick answers to our most common inquiries.

turnaroundTime.question: What is the typical turnaround time for a full vehicle wrap?
turnaroundTime.answer: Turnaround time typically ranges from 3–7 business days depending on design complexity, printing, and installation scheduling.

onsiteInstallation.question: Do you provide on-site installation services?
onsiteInstallation.answer: Yes, we offer on-site installation services depending on your location and project size.

vinylUvLife.question: How long do the vinyl materials last under UV exposure?
vinylUvLife.answer: High-quality vinyl materials typically last 5–7 years with proper care, even under strong UV exposure.

footer.description: Transforming visions into reality through premium printing and design solutions.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

about.heroDescription: Revolutionizing automotive aesthetics with high-impact precision and neon-infused creativity.
about.originParagraph1: Founded at the intersection of automotive passion and cutting-edge design, ReactIf Printing & Design specializes in pushing the boundaries of visual communication. We started as a small workshop with a single vision: to treat every vehicle as a high-performance canvas.
about.originParagraph2: Our mission is to transform the ordinary into the extraordinary. By blending industrial-grade materials with futuristic design aesthetics, we help our clients demand attention on the road and beyond.

commitments.quality: Uncompromising quality in every square inch.

premiumWraps.title: Premium Vehicle Wraps
premiumWraps.description: Utilizing industry-leading vinyl and precision installation techniques for a flawless finish that protects and performs.

highImpactDesign.title: High-Impact Design
highImpactDesign.description: Custom livery and graphics designed to capture the essence of your brand or personal style with striking visual clarity.

industrialPrecision.title: Industrial Precision
industrialPrecision.description: State-of-the-art printing technology ensuring color accuracy and durability that stands up to the rigors of the road.

cta.title: Have questions about our terms?
cta.description: Our legal team is here to help you understand your rights.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content1: Welcome to Reactif Printing & Design. These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access and use of our website, products, and services.
introduction.content2: Reactif provides high-quality digital and physical printing solutions, graphic design services, and branding consultations.

userResponsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.item1: You are responsible for ensuring all uploaded files meet technical specifications.
userResponsibilities.item2: You must own or have rights to all submitted content.
userResponsibilities.item3: You agree not to use services for unlawful or offensive materials.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content1: All content created during the design phase remains the property of Reactif until final payment.
intellectualProperty.highlight: Upon final payment, ownership transfers to the client, while Reactif retains the right to showcase work in portfolio and marketing materials.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content1: Reactif shall not be liable for indirect or incidental damages.
liability.content2: We do not guarantee exact color matching between digital and physical prints.
liability.content3: Maximum liability is limited to the amount paid for the service.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content1: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which ReactIf Printing & Design is registered, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

cta.title: Have questions about your privacy?
cta.description: Our team is here to help you understand how your data is collected, used, and protected.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content1: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
introduction.content2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform and services.

information.title: Information We Collect
information.item1: Personal information such as name, email, phone number, and address
information.item4: Usage data including interactions with our platform

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content1: We use your information to provide and improve our services.
use.content2: This includes processing orders, managing accounts, and providing customer support.
use.highlight: We may also use your data to personalize your experience and send important updates or promotional communications.

sharing.title: Data Sharing and Security
sharing.content1: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
sharing.content2: We may share data with trusted service providers for payment processing and service delivery.
sharing.content3: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content1: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information.
rights.content2: You may opt out of marketing communications whenever needed.
rights.content3: You can request a copy of your stored data.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content1: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience.
cookies.content2: These help us understand user behavior and improve our platform.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
changes.content2: Any changes will be communicated through our platform or via email.
